# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent datastore security.
# Category: datastore_security

# Elasticsearch Snapshot Configuration
snapshot:
  repository:
    s3:
      type: s3
      settings:
        bucket: "my-elasticsearch-backups"
        region: "us-west-2"
        endpoint: "s3.amazonaws.com"
        access_key: "${AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID}"
        secret_key: "${AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY}"
        chunk_size: "1g"
        compress: true
        concurrent_streams: 5
        max_restore_bytes_per_sec: "20mb"
        max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: "20mb"
        readonly: false
    fs:
      type: fs
      settings:
        location: "/mnt/backups/elasticsearch"
        compress: true
        chunk_size: "1g"
        concurrent_streams: 5
        max_restore_bytes_per_sec: "20mb"
        max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: "20mb"
        readonly: false
  schedule:
    daily:
      cron: "0 0 * * *"
      enabled: true
      repository: "s3"
      name: "daily-snapshot-{now/d}"
      indices: "*"
      ignore_unavailable: true
      include_global_state: true
      wait_for_completion: true
      max_wait_time: "1h"
    weekly:
      cron: "0 0 * * 0"
      enabled: true
      repository: "s3"
      name: "weekly-snapshot-{now/w}"
      indices: "*"
      ignore_unavailable: true
      include_global_state: true
      wait_for_completion: true
      max_wait_time: "1h"
  retention:
    policy:
      daily:
        max_age: "7d"
        max_count: 7
      weekly:
        max_age: "30d"
        max_count: 4
  security:
    encryption:
      enabled: true
      algorithm: "AES-256"
    access_control:
      roles:
        snapshot_admin:
          cluster: ["cluster:monitor/main"]
          index:
            - "indices:admin/create"
            - "indices:admin/delete"
            - "indices:admin/exists"
            - "indices:admin/get"
            - "indices:admin/refresh"
            - "indices:admin/upgrade"
            - "indices:data/read"
            - "indices:data/write"
        snapshot_reader:
          cluster: ["cluster:monitor/main"]
          index:
            - "indices:admin/get"
            - "indices:data/read"
    credentials:
      aws:
        access_key: "${AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID}"
        secret_key: "${AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY}"
        session_token: "${AWS_SESSION_TOKEN}"
      file:
        path: "/etc/elasticsearch/credentials"
        permissions: "600"
  monitoring:
    enabled: true
    metrics:
      - "snapshot_creation_time"
      - "snapshot_restoration_time"
      - "snapshot_size"
      - "snapshot_status"
    alerts:
      - name: "snapshot_failure"
        condition: "snapshot_status == 'failed'"
        action: "email_notification"
      - name: "snapshot_timeout"
        condition: "snapshot_creation_time > 3600"
        action: "slack_notification"
